headline: REPLY Unveils the New Editions of the Reply AI Music Contest and Reply AI Film Festival under the Theme "Imaginatio Nova"
summary: TURIN, Italy, March 19, 2026--Reply [EXM, STAR: REY, ISIN: IT0005282865] confirms its commitment for 2026 to fostering dialogue between creativity, technology and artificial intelligence through the Reply AI Music Contest and the Reply AI Film Festival, the two international AI competitions open to creatives, filmmakers, musicians and innovation professionals from around the world. content.title: REPLY Unveils the New Editions of the Reply AI Music Contest and Reply AI Film Festival under the Theme "Imaginatio Nova"
content.summary: TURIN, Italy, March 19, 2026--Reply [EXM, STAR: REY, ISIN: IT0005282865] confirms its commitment for 2026 to fostering dialogue between creativity, technology and artificial intelligence through the Reply AI Music Contest and the Reply AI Film Festival, the two international AI competitions open to creatives, filmmakers, musicians and innovation professionals from around the world. thumbnail.caption: These initiatives are part of the Reply Challenges, a programme of technological and creative competitions that reflects Reply’s commitment to developing innovative educational models capable of engaging new generations.
